calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney Fees Pursuant To Labor Code 98.2(K)
Off Calendar Feb-20-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MARIO WILSON'S Motion For Attorney Fees Pursuant To Labor Code 98.2(K) is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER AND SECOND AMENDED JUDGMENT FILED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Judgment To Correct Name Of Judgment Debtor Pursuant To
Off Calendar Nov-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF MARIO WILSON'S Motion To Amend Judgment To Correct Name Of Judgment Debtor from Adaptive Media, Inc to Adaptive Medias Inc. is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Amend Judgment To Correct Name Of Judgment Debtor
Off Calendar May-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: GREG GROENEVELD, ESQ., 415.308.3637, FOR PLAINTIFF MARIO ARMANDO WILSON; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MARIO WILSON's Motion To Amend Judgment To Correct Name Of Judgment Debtor is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Counsel for plaintiff to submit proposed amended judgment. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sandy Carranza #7062.
